subject: English
title: Iswaran the Storyteller – Easy Short Notes

key_points: The story 'Iswaran the Storyteller' is written by R. K. Laxman
Mahendra is a junior supervisor who works at different construction sites
Iswaran is Mahendra’s cook and loyal companion
Iswaran entertains Mahendra with dramatic stories
One story is about a mad elephant that entered a town
Another story describes a female ghost appearing on full-moon nights
characters: Mahendra – A practical and logical junior supervisor
Iswaran – An imaginative cook and fascinating storyteller
literary_devices: Suspense – Used to make the narrative exciting
Imagery – Vivid description of the ghost scene
exam_tips: Remember that Iswaran is Mahendra’s cook and storyteller
Focus on the elephant story and ghost story
Mention imagination and fear as the main themes
Understand how suspense is created in the story
